cases.name: while read loops: basic while read
cases.script: echo -e "a\nb\nc" | while read x; do echo "got: $x"; done

cases.name: while read loops: while read terminates on EOF
cases.script: echo -e "1\n2\n3" | while read n; do echo $n; done; echo done

cases.name: while read loops: while read with head
cases.script:
echo -e "1
2
3
4
5" | head -3 | while read x; do echo "x=$x"; done

cases.name: while read loops: read returns 1 on empty input
